testcase.name: test_custom_headers_set

failure.message: AttributeError: trying to obtain a non-existing attribute: headers

testcase.failure:
self = <test.custom_header_test.TestCustomHeaderSender testMethod=test_custom_headers_set>
def test_custom_headers_set(self): sender = smarty.RequestsSender header = {'Test-User-Agent': 'Test-Agent', 'Test-Content-Type': 'Test-Type'} sender = smarty.CustomHeaderSender(header, sender) smartyrequest = smarty.Request() smartyrequest.url_prefix = "http://localhost" smartyrequest.payload = "This is the test content."
request = sender.build_request(smartyrequest)
> self.assertEqual('Test-Agent', request.headers['Test-User-Agent']) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: trying to obtain a non-existing attribute: headers
test/custom_header_test.py:25: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_custom_headers_used
testcase.failure:
self = <test.custom_header_test.TestCustomHeaderSender testMethod=test_custom_headers_used>
def test_custom_headers_used(self): sender = smarty.RequestsSender() header = {'User-Agent': 'Test-Agent', 'Content-Type': 'Test-Type'} sender = smarty.CustomHeaderSender(header, sender) smartyrequest = smarty.Request() smartyrequest.url_prefix = "http://localhost" smartyrequest.payload = "This is the test content."
request = sender.build_request(smartyrequest)
> request = smarty.requests_sender.build_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
test/custom_header_test.py:38: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
smarty_request = <pycurl.Curl object at 0x130706710>, ip = None
def build_request(smarty_request, ip=None): try: > request = Request(url=smarty_request.url_prefix, params=smarty_request.parameters) ^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'Request' is not defined
smartystreets_python_sdk/requests_sender.py:68: NameError

testcase.name: test_http_request_contains_post_when_appropriate

self = <test.requests_sender_test.TestRequestsSender testMethod=test_http_request_contains_post_when_appropriate>

testcase.name: test_request_has_correct_content_type
testcase.failure:
self = <test.requests_sender_test.TestRequestsSender testMethod=test_request_has_correct_content_type>

testcase.name: test_smartyresponse_contains_correct_payload
testcase.failure:
self = <test.requests_sender_test.TestRequestsSender testMethod=test_smartyresponse_contains_correct_payload> mock_send = <MagicMock name='send' id='4375819808'>
@patch('requests.Session.send', side_effect=mocked_session_send) def test_smartyresponse_contains_correct_payload(self, mock_send): sender = smarty.RequestsSender() smartyrequest = smarty.Request() smartyrequest.url_prefix = "http://localhost" smartyrequest.payload = "This is the test content."
> response = sender.send(smartyrequest) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

smartystreets_python_sdk/requests_sender.py:68: NameError

testcase.failure:
self = <test.x_forwarded_for_test.TestCustomHeaderSender testMethod=test_custom_headers_used> mock_send = <MagicMock name='send' id='4377348144'>
@patch('requests.Session.send', side_effect=mocked_session_send) def test_custom_headers_used(self, mock_send): sender = smarty.RequestsSender(ip = '0.0.0.0') smartyrequest = smarty.Request() smartyrequest.url_prefix = "http://localhost" smartyrequest.payload = "This is the test content."
> request = smarty.requests_sender.build_request(smartyrequest, '0.0.0.0') ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
